cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0126 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set_property(DIRECTORY PROPERTY INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "")
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "-O2")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "-g")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
add_definitions([==[-v]==])
cmake_policy(SET CMP0065 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "/tmp/opencode/cross-platform-llm-client/local_plugins/llama_flutter_android/android/.cxx/Debug/2646492z/arm64-v8a/src/main/cpp/llama.cpp/ggml/src/ggml-vulkan/vulkan-shaders-gen-prefix/src/vulkan-shaders-gen-build/CMakeFiles/CMakeTmp")
add_executable(cmTC_277a0 "/home/azmarpop/Android/Sdk/cmake/3.22.1/share/cmake-3.22/Modules/CMakeCCompilerABI.c")
target_link_libraries(cmTC_277a0 ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
